publicationName.description: The name of your Blue Billywig publication

accountId.description: Your publication ID at Blue Billywig

rendererCode.description: The name of the renderer to use in your Blue Billywig publication

connections.description: Back-ends to connect with. For every value in this a param matching the back-end should exist too.

video.description: Any OpenRTB 2.5 video params to additionally send along to the SSPs.

rendererSettings.description: Any playout property for the renderer you wish to override.
